description_long: This juice bar features a rectangular, multi-tiered structure with two open shelves supported by cylindrical white pillars and a solid base. The top and shelf surfaces are decorated with a striking turquoise and black abstract pattern, giving the bar a modern, eye-catching appearance. The base is clad in a ribbed, metallic-looking material with a small blue-framed access panel and several visible pipes and conduits, suggesting an industrial influence. The rear side displays a digital control panel and additional piping, while the left side includes a boxy extension and more exposed tubing. The bar appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with some plastic and electronic components. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks or parks.
description: A modern, multi-tiered juice bar with turquoise patterned surfaces, metallic ribbed base, and exposed piping, blending industrial and contemporary styles.
description_view_0: Front-on view showing the patterned top and shelves, white pillars, and the ribbed metallic base with visible pipes on the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the bar, the blue-framed access panel, and the layered shelf structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the patterned surfaces, white pillars, and additional piping and boxy extension.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a digital control panel, more exposed pipes, and the layered shelf design with some equipment on the left.
attribute_blender_equipment: Two small blender-like devices are visible on the left side of the back shelf, colored purple and blue, with a compact, modern design.
attribute_architectural_style: modern industrial; characterized by exposed piping, metallic ribbed surfaces, abstract patterned glass, and a digital control panel.
